status_notes: Generated from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21; org metadata copied from existing same-org entries under other SecID types.
notes: UK national standards body. Publishes BS (British Standards) and BS ISO/IEC (UK editions of ISO/IEC standards). Notable independent BS publications: BS 10012 (privacy info mgmt), BS 65000 (organizational resilience), BS 7799 (historical ancestor of ISO/IEC 27001/27002). Standards are paywalled — purchase from shop.bsigroup.com.
